---
title: Little book of DES
image: homepage.png
---

In **February 2025**, I contributed to the HSMA little book of DES, a resource developed by **Sammi Rosser** and **Dan Chalk**.

<iframe
  class="auto-preview"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  src="https://des.hsma.co.uk/"
  title="HSMA - the little book of DES">
</iframe>
